# PayslipIQ USA

PayslipIQ helps US workers understand their pay stubs, paychecks, deductions, taxes, and take-home pay in plain English. Educational only, not tax / legal / financial / accounting / payroll advice.

USA-only. Not affiliated with the IRS, SSA, US Department of Labor, any state tax agency, employer, or payroll provider.

> All URLs below are canonical (no trailing slash). Every page shows a last-reviewed date and links to the relevant IRS or state source.

## Core entry points

- Homepage: https://payslipiq.com/us
- Pay Stub Checker: https://payslipiq.com/us/pay-stub-checker
- Paycheck Calculator: https://payslipiq.com/us/paycheck-calculator
- Take-Home Pay by salary: https://payslipiq.com/us/take-home-pay
- Gross to Net Calculator: https://payslipiq.com/us/gross-to-net-paycheck-calculator
- Salary After Tax: https://payslipiq.com/us/salary-after-tax
- State tax index: https://payslipiq.com/us/state-tax
- Find a CPA: https://payslipiq.com/us/find-a-cpa

## Key explainers

- FICA explained: https://payslipiq.com/us/fica-explained
- Federal withholding: https://payslipiq.com/us/federal-tax-withholding
- W-4 guide: https://payslipiq.com/us/w4-guide
- W-2 explained: https://payslipiq.com/us/w2-explained
- Why is my paycheck lower: https://payslipiq.com/us/why-is-my-paycheck-lower
- Pay stub anatomy: https://payslipiq.com/us/pay-stub-anatomy
- Pay stub glossary: https://payslipiq.com/us/glossary
- 2026 pay numbers (wage base, limits, brackets): https://payslipiq.com/us/2026-pay-numbers

## Premium products

- 12-page Premium Pay Stub Report ($29 one-time): https://payslipiq.com/us/premium-pay-stub-report
- Monthly Paycheck Monitor ($9/mo): https://payslipiq.com/us/monthly-paycheck-monitor

## Editorial standards

- Reviewed by named editorial team. Every page shows last-reviewed date.
- Educational only. Always points users to the IRS, state agency, or qualified CPA for confirmation.
- Methodology: https://payslipiq.com/methodology
- About the team: https://payslipiq.com/us/about-the-team

## Trust

- Trust Center: https://payslipiq.com/trust
- Privacy: https://payslipiq.com/privacy
- Disclaimer: https://payslipiq.com/disclaimer
- Security policy: https://payslipiq.com/.well-known/security.txt
